title: Presented Automated Hydroponics AI at STEAM Design Exhibition 2026
description: Exhibited the Automated Hydroponics AI system at the STEAM Design Exhibition and received a certificate of appreciation from Hon. Minister Mahabir Pun.

title: Participated in PCB Design Workshop
description: Completed the PCB Design Workshop organized by the IoT R&D Lab, Kathmandu University, focusing on practical PCB design and embedded hardware development.

title: Organized AI Conclave 2026
description: Successfully organized AI Conclave 2026 as President of the Kathmandu University AI Club (KUAIC), bringing together students, researchers, and industry professionals through technical sessions, competitions, and networking events.

title: Awarded STEAM Design Grant
description: Received the STEAM Design Grant to develop the Automated Hydroponics AI system integrating reinforcement learning, computer vision, and IoT technologies.
